nl_query: What is the average number of annotations per frozen attempt?
failed_sql:

FROM   evaluation_annotation ea
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea_f ON ea_f.id = ea.attempt_id
WHERE  ea_f.status = 'FROZEN';
